untranslatable_reason: Horn Top pattern definition references 'defined 3-week width' and 'ultimate low at variable timeframes post-breakout' which cannot be precisely expressed with point-in-time indicators. Pattern requires multi-bar structural analysis (identifying the horn formation itself and measuring post-breakout swing lows) that exceeds single-bar indicator capabilities. The reversal signal is inferred as overbought condition near range high transitioning lower.
